dialogueChunks.intro: The situation has gotten worse, {player_name}. Another {quest_ally} was found dead near {location}. The killer was one of our own: still doesn't believe what they did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I found tracks leading {location_hint} that suggest the {enemy_type} are deliberately provoking these attacks. The {quest_focus} seems to be the key: whoever controls it can make anyone look like the enemy. {target_npc} might know more about how to counter it.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need {quest_item} to break this cycle. Without it, every patrol we send out is a gamble on whether they'll come back as themselves.

playerResponses.text: I'll track down the source and retrieve {quest_item}.
Maybe the patrols should stop going out until this is solved.
This is beyond what I signed up for.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the guards are refusing to patrol. After what happened at {location}, I can't blame them. Nobody wants to be the next one to kill a friend.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} is spreading faster than we expected. {quest_ally} confirmed that the {enemy_type} have been planting {quest_item} along our patrol routes: it's what triggers the confusion. Every route we've used for months is compromised. {target_npc} thinks there's a way to neutralize the effect, but it requires materials from deep in hostile territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement is paralyzed. If we can't trust our own eyes, we can't defend ourselves. Get to {target_npc} and find out what they need.

playerResponses.text: Tell me where {target_npc} is. I'll get what they need.
What guarantee is there that their solution will work?

dialogueChunks.intro: The woman who killed her brother hasn't spoken since. She just sits by the grave, holding {quest_item}. The whole settlement watches her and sees their own future.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered that {quest_threat} originates from {location}. The {enemy_type} have been using {quest_focus} to turn our people into weapons against each other. It's deliberate and methodical. Every casualty weakens us without the enemy risking a single soldier.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have to strike at {location} and destroy {quest_focus} before there's no one left who trusts anyone. {quest_ally} is willing to guide you, but even they aren't sure they can trust their own senses anymore.

playerResponses.text: I'll go. Someone who isn't affected needs to end this.
What if I become affected too?
This settlement is already lost. I'm sorry.
